title: Roadmap
description: Schema for the living task roadmap used by the Agentic Workflow Prompt Framework. Source of truth for project progress.

_template_meta.description: Metadata about the template itself. Stripped when instantiated for a real project.

project_name.description: The project name. Replace [Project Name] when instantiating.

prd_issue_number.description: GitHub Issue number for the PRD tracking issue. Populated by /plan-to-issues.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this file.

current_phase.description: Current phase number and name (e.g., 'Phase 3: Parallel TDD Execution').

status_legend.description: Canonical task status values. Add project-specific states if needed.

strategy.description: Execution strategy. parallel_waves is the default.

test_command.description: Shell command to run the project's test suite (e.g., 'npm test', 'npx playwright test').

default_max_turns.description: Default maximum turns per task before escalation.

escalation_threshold.description: Fraction of max_turns at which to warn the implementer (e.g., 0.8 = 80%).

hard_stop.description: If true, pause the implementer at 100% budget. If false, allow overrun with escalation.

team_config.description: Optional. Set by orchestrator when using agent teams. Ignored in solo/bash modes.

execution_mode.description: Which agent team pattern is in use for this wave.

wave.description: Wave number. Tasks within a wave run in parallel.

tasks.description: Task IDs in this wave. Minimum 1, maximum 3 per wave.

rationale.description: Why these tasks can run in parallel (no shared dependencies or files).

branch_strategy.description: Git branch naming convention for this track.

scope.description: Brief description of what this task covers.

acceptance_criteria.description: Criteria that must be met for the task to be considered complete.

eval_ids.description: IDs from evals.json that this task must satisfy.

eval_results.description: Map of eval_id to result. Populated after execution. PASS = test passes. FAIL = test fails. SKIP = intentionally not tested (infrastructure unavailable, dependency incomplete, or user waived). Always document SKIP reason in completion_notes. Note: This enum (PASS/FAIL/SKIP) differs intentionally from evals.json status values (NOT_TESTED/PASS/FAIL/DEPRECATED). evals.json tracks scenario lifecycle; roadmap.json tracks per-task execution results. NOT_TESTED evals are absent from eval_results; DEPRECATED evals are excluded.

execution_type.description: AFK = fully autonomous. HITL = requires human interaction during execution.

files_to_modify.description: Files this task expects to create or modify. Populated during Phase 2 planning. Used by wave computation for overlap detection.

files_touched.description: Files created or modified by this task.

completion_notes.description: What was done, any deviations from plan.

agent_instructions.description: Specific instructions for the agent executing this task. Single paragraph or semicolon-separated directives, under 500 chars. Implementation guidance that does NOT belong in acceptance_criteria.

items.description: Project-root-relative file path. No leading slash. No absolute paths. No globs or wildcards.

context_needed.description: Files the agent should read before starting this task.

branch.description: Git worktree branch name for this task (e.g., 'feature/task-1.2').

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must be completed before this task can start.

wave.description: Which execution wave this task belongs to.

max_turns.description: Maximum agent turns budgeted for this task.

rollback_count.description: Number of times this task has been rolled back.

rollback_reason.description: Reason for the most recent rollback, if any.

test_files.description: Test files scaffolded during the RED stage.

completed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was completed. Null if not yet complete.

agent_assignment.description: Optional. Populated by orchestrator during agent team execution. Ignored in solo/bash modes.

worktree_path.description: Path to the git worktree directory for this task.

assigned_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent was assigned.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent completed the task.

preflight_passed.description: Whether pre-flight validation passed before spawning. Set by orchestrator.

eval_results.description: Summary of eval results. Format: 'All PASS' or 'N/M PASS, N FAIL, N SKIP' (e.g., 'All PASS', '3/4 PASS, 1 SKIP').

agent_notes.description: Summary notes from the completing agent.
